mapper.select: SELECT count(*) from companies WHERE BIZ_NO = #{business_no}
SELECT com_no AS company_id, biz_no AS business_no, com_nm, status, reg_dt FROM companies WHERE biz_no = #{business_no}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO company_users (COM_USR_NO, COM_NO, LOGIN_ID, SECU_PW, USR_NM, phone, birth, email, STATUS, gender, ENG_NM, REG_DT) VALUES( SEQ_COMPANY_USERS.NEXTVAL, #{company_id},#{login_id},#{password},#{name}, #{phone},#{birth},#{email},#{status},#{gender},#{e_name},SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO foreign_accounts_company ( ACNT_NO, ACNT_PWD, BANK_NM, ACNT_NUM, COM_NO, ACNT_STAT_CD, LMT_ONCE, LMT_DAILY) VALUES ( SEQ_FOREIGN_ACCOUNTS_COMPANY.NEXTVAL, #{account_pw}, #{bank_name}, #{account_no}, #{company_id}, #{account_status}, #{limit_one_time}, #{limit_daily} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM company_users WHERE Login_id = #{Login_id}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT ACNT_NUM FROM accounts_company UNION ALL SELECT ACNT_NUM FROM foreign_accounts_company UNION ALL SELECT ACNT_NUM FROM accounts_personal UNION ALL SELECT ACNT_NUM FROM foreign_accounts_personal ) combined_accounts WHERE TRIM(combined_accounts.ACNT_NUM) = #{account_no}
